<sentence>This arrangement is not random; it's a highly efficient packing system that maximizes sunlight exposure for each floret.</sentence>
<sentence>The outer ray florets are often large, brightly colored, and sterile, serving to attract pollinators.</sentence>
<sentence>Inside these, numerous smaller, fertile disk florets are densely packed, forming the central part of the flower.</sentence>
<sentence>As the sunflower matures, the disk florets develop into seeds, arranged in a dense, concentric pattern within the head.</sentence>
<sentence>The entire pattern, from the arrangement of the florets to the resulting seed structure, is a testament to nature's mathematical precision.</sentence>
<sentence>This spiral arrangement ensures that as new florets grow, they can emerge without overcrowding or disturbing the older ones.</sentence>
<sentence>The iconic sunflower pattern is a beautiful and functional example of mathematical order in the natural world.</sentence>
